title: How Gen Z Became Millionaires?
description:
50% of Gen Z in India already have side gigs, and they're earning more than millennials with 5+ years of experience. 

The 3 side hustles printing money,Creator Economy, Sneaker Reselling  and AI micro-SaaS, No degree. No campus placement. Just speed and audience. Which one are you starting? Comment below
